host.generalBody: This computer runs only your own sync jobs. Your private key stays local; SpendWise only queues encrypted work.
host.generalNote: In the next flow, each user will be able to pair their own machine.
host.defaultBody: Hi {0}, this machine runs the default SpendWise sync jobs. Keep it online when you want queued work to continue from here.
host.defaultNote: Your responsibility: keep this computer and its network available when sync is needed.

status.hint: No bank login happens unless SpendWise queues a sync.

result.failure: Last run had a failure - see agent.log
result.upToDate: Up to date - no work was waiting
result.timeout: Timed out after {0}m - cancelled ({1} process(es) stopped)

model.title: Local sync model
model.runsBody: The browser session opens here, not on SpendWise.
model.encryptedBody: The server queues work; the private key stays local.

startup.label: Launch automatically when Windows starts
startup.interval: Checks for queued work every {0} minutes. The watchdog cancels a stuck scrape after {1} minutes, so the window never sits on Syncing forever.

cleanup.none: Nothing to clean up - all clear.
cleanup.title: Clean up stuck processes

tray.stuckBody: A sync got stuck and was cancelled after {0} minutes.
